response.original_title: Corpus Schizophrenic: A Portal 2 Short Film
response.overview: Corpus Schizophrenic: A Portal 2 Short Film is a 2019 independent sci-fi short film written and directed by Kane Parsons, also known online as Kane Pixels. Inspired by Portal 2, the project reimagines the universe of the iconic game through a darker, atmospheric, and cinematic lens. Combining practical filmmaking techniques, visual effects, and environmental storytelling, the short explores the abandoned and mysterious world of Aperture Science while expanding upon the unsettling tone hidden within the original game's setting. Released years before Parsons gained widespread recognition for The Backrooms, the film showcased many of the creative elements that would later define his work, including liminal spaces, immersive worldbuilding, analog-inspired aesthetics, and a fascination with vast, forgotten environments. Today, Corpus Schizophrenic remains an early example of Kane Parsons' distinctive visual style and passion for atmospheric science-fiction storytelling.
response.title: Corpus Schizophrenic: A Portal 2 Short Film
